partners.name: Ghana Cocoa Board
partners.description: CHED operates as a specialized division under Ghana Cocoa Board, implementing policies and programs for cocoa industry development.

partners.name: Ministry of Food and Agriculture
partners.description: Collaboration on agricultural policy development, farmer support initiatives, and national food security programs.

partners.name: World Cocoa Foundation
partners.description: Partnership for sustainable cocoa production, farmer livelihoods improvement, and industry best practices.

partners.name: Cocoa Research Institute of Ghana
partners.description: Joint research on disease control, improved cocoa varieties, and sustainable farming methods.

partners.name: International Cocoa Organization
partners.description: Global cooperation on cocoa industry standards, market analysis, and production practices.

partners.name: Kwame Nkrumah University of Science & Technology
partners.description: Training programs, agricultural research collaboration, and student internship opportunities.

partners.name: GIZ Ghana
partners.description: Technical cooperation for sustainable agricultural development and capacity building.

partners.name: Fairtrade Ghana
partners.description: Support for fair trade certification and premium cocoa production standards.

benefits.title: Technical Assistance
benefits.description: Access to expertise and resources for program implementation.

benefits.title: Infrastructure Development
benefits.description: Joint investment in facilities and operational capacity.

benefits.title: International Standards
benefits.description: Alignment with global best practices in cocoa production.

benefits.title: Community Impact
benefits.description: Expanded reach and effectiveness of farmer support programs.
